'''rachate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xenologously|xenologously]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-ch-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xenologously|xenologously]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rachate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:rachate|rachate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rachatesher|rachatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rachatesherĂ«m|rachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rachatero|rachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rachateshĂ«|rachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rachateshĂ«m|rachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirachatero|gokirachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirachateshĂ«|gokirachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirachateshĂ«m|gokirachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorachankerom|gorachankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorachankeshĂ«|gorachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorachankeshĂ«m|gorachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorachankeya|gorachankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rachaterom|rachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rachatemu|rachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rachateya|rachateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirachaterom|gokirachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirachatemu|gokirachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirachateya|gokirachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:rachachate|rachachate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rachachatesher|rachachatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rachachatesherĂ«m|rachachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rachachatero|rachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rachachateshĂ«|rachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rachachateshĂ«m|rachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirachachatero|gokirachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirachachateshĂ«|gokirachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirachachateshĂ«m|gokirachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorachachankerom|gorachachankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorachachankeshĂ«|gorachachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorachachankeshĂ«m|gorachachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorachachankeya|gorachachankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rachachaterom|rachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rachachatemu|rachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rachachateya|rachachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirachachaterom|gokirachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirachachatemu|gokirachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirachachateya|gokirachachateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:rĂŠchĂŠte|rĂŠchĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rĂŠchĂŠtesher|rĂŠchĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m|rĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠchĂŠtero|rĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|rĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|rĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠchĂŠtero|gokirĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|gokirĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|gokirĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorĂŠchĂŠnkerom|gorĂŠchĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«|gorĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gorĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorĂŠchĂŠnkeya|gorĂŠchĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠchĂŠterom|rĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠchĂŠtemu|rĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rĂŠchĂŠteya|rĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠchĂŠterom|gokirĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠchĂŠtemu|gokirĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirĂŠchĂŠteya|gokirĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:rafchafte|rafchafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rafchaftesher|rafchaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafchaftesherĂ«m|rafchaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafchaftero|rafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rafchafteshĂ«|rafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafchafteshĂ«m|rafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafchaftero|gokirafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirafchafteshĂ«|gokirafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafchafteshĂ«m|gokirafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorafchafnkerom|gorafchafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorafchafnkeshĂ«|gorafchafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorafchafnkeshĂ«m|gorafchafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorafchafnkeya|gorafchafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafchafterom|rafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafchaftemu|rafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rafchafteya|rafchafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafchafterom|gokirafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafchaftemu|gokirafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirafchafteya|gokirafchafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
